return(function(o,v,Y,l,E,K,R,O,u,G,Z,J,C,k,q,F,a,S,s,T,f,V,M)M,C,Z,J,u,s,F,G,S,T,O,f,V,a,q,k=function(o,i)local v=O(i)local Y=function(Y,l,E)return u(o,{Y,l;E},i,v)end return Y
